title: Refutation
description: A single refutation object returned by an adversary persona. Each persona returns a JSON array of these. On unrecoverable failure, the array contains a single error-form object instead of a refutation.

persona.description: Name of the persona that raised this refutation.

field.description: Dot-path to the seed field being challenged, e.g. 'decisions[2]' or 'summary'.

claim.description: Exact text of the claim being challenged.

problem.description: One sentence: what is wrong with the claim.

transcript_span.description: Exact quote from the transcript that supports the refutation, or null if the problem is absence of any span.

persona.description: Name of the persona that encountered the failure.

error.description: Short description of the unrecoverable failure.

details.description: Optional: additional context (stack trace, file path, etc.).
